proof: semiring_hom_kernel_quotient_induced[S, T](f, semiring_hom_kernel_quotient_project[S, T](f, a)) = semiring_hom_kernel_quotient_induced[S, T](f, semiring_hom_kernel_quotient_project[S, T](f, b)) != (semiring_hom_kernel_quotient_project[S, T](f, a) = semiring_hom_kernel_quotient_project[S, T](f, b))

ring_hom_kernel_quotient_induced[R, S](f, ring_hom_kernel_quotient_project[R, S](f, a)) = ring_hom_kernel_quotient_induced[R, S](f, ring_hom_kernel_quotient_project[R, S](f, b)) != (ring_hom_kernel_quotient_project[R, S](f, a) = ring_hom_kernel_quotient_project[R, S](f, b))

group_hom_kernel_quotient_induced[G, H](f, group_hom_kernel_quotient_project[G, H](f, a)) = group_hom_kernel_quotient_induced[G, H](f, group_hom_kernel_quotient_project[G, H](f, b)) != (group_hom_kernel_quotient_project[G, H](f, a) = group_hom_kernel_quotient_project[G, H](f, b))

monoid_hom_kernel_quotient_induced[M, N](f, monoid_hom_kernel_quotient_project[M, N](f, a)) = monoid_hom_kernel_quotient_induced[M, N](f, monoid_hom_kernel_quotient_project[M, N](f, b)) != (monoid_hom_kernel_quotient_project[M, N](f, a) = monoid_hom_kernel_quotient_project[M, N](f, b))

add_monoid_hom_kernel_quotient_induced[A, B](f, add_monoid_hom_kernel_quotient_project[A, B](f, a)) = add_monoid_hom_kernel_quotient_induced[A, B](f, add_monoid_hom_kernel_quotient_project[A, B](f, b)) != (add_monoid_hom_kernel_quotient_project[A, B](f, a) = add_monoid_hom_kernel_quotient_project[A, B](f, b))

add_group_hom_kernel_quotient_induced[A, B](f, add_group_hom_kernel_quotient_project[A, B](f, a)) = add_group_hom_kernel_quotient_induced[A, B](f, add_group_hom_kernel_quotient_project[A, B](f, b)) != (add_group_hom_kernel_quotient_project[A, B](f, a) = add_group_hom_kernel_quotient_project[A, B](f, b))

linear_map_kernel_quotient_induced[R, M, N](src, dst, f, linear_map_kernel_quotient_project[R, M, N](src, dst, f, a)) = linear_map_kernel_quotient_induced[R, M, N](src, dst, f, linear_map_kernel_quotient_project[R, M, N](src, dst, f, b)) != (linear_map_kernel_quotient_project[R, M, N](src, dst, f, a) = linear_map_kernel_quotient_project[R, M, N](src, dst, f, b))
